source_name: AEMO Generation Information register - capacity by fuel type
notes: AEMO NEM January 2026 Generation Information workbook Summary table, NEM operational and non-scheduled generators, existing and new developments by fuel-technology category. The headline is listed nameplate capacity across existing, committed, anticipated and publicly announced rows. It is not available capacity, reliability, dispatchability or a construction guarantee.
source_rights: AEMO terms of use for tabular data
citation: Australian Energy Market Operator, NEM January 2026 Generation Information workbook, Summary sheet.
